query: Please upgrade our Astro Starlight docs site, regenerate API pages, and improve the docs navigation and theme.
notes: Negative control: nerdbot is available as the skill under test, but the request should route to docs-steward rather than knowledge-base workflows.
expected_behavior: Agent does NOT activate nerdbot for this request
Agent recognizes the request as docs-site maintenance rather than markdown-first knowledge-base work
Agent redirects to docs-steward as the appropriate skill for Astro/Starlight docs-site work
Agent avoids reframing the task as raw/wiki KB structuring, provenance repair, or activity-log maintenance
